chunks.title: Exercise 5 - Snake Water Gun
chunks.text: Guys, you must have heard about Snake Water Gun.

chunks.text: What happens in this is that a person will make a snake, water gun,

chunks.title: Exercise 5 - Snake Water Gun
chunks.text: And the gun kills the snake.

chunks.title: Exercise 5 - Snake Water Gun
chunks.text: And the water spoils the gun.

chunks.title: Exercise 5 - Snake Water Gun
chunks.text: So, according to this, the player gets points for whatever he made randomly.

chunks.title: Exercise 5 - Snake Water Gun

chunks.title: Exercise 5 - Snake Water Gun

chunks.title: Exercise 5 - Snake Water Gun

chunks.title: Exercise 5 - Snake Water Gun

chunks.title: Exercise 5 - Snake Water Gun
